asset.title: Free Job Halo
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview demonstrates collaborative spreadsheet updates via agents, but the rapid transition speed and dense text layout make it difficult to fully digest the sequence of events.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates agent-driven spreadsheet updates, though the dense UI makes the exact feature interaction slightly difficult to isolate immediately.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, user request, agent execution, and final spreadsheet update, but the transition is extremely rapid.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed UI is modern and structured, but the high density of panels and text elements creates visual clutter.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, chat, and agent execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a genuine UI capture of the application, showing realistic data and logs.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the chat and trace logs are difficult to read at standard preview resolutions.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to financial analysts and operations teams looking at automated diligence workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the UI state changes and execution logs without artificial overlays.

observedEvidence: Public chat panel with user 'Homen' requesting variance recomputation
Spreadsheet panel showing formula updates and variance calculations
NodeAgent trace logs updating in real-time at the bottom

defects.observed: The transition from the user request to the agent execution and spreadsheet update happens too quickly to follow comfortably.
defects.fix: Increase the delay between frames or slow down the GIF playback speed to allow users to read the chat and trace logs.

defects.observed: Small text in the 'Your NodeAgent' and 'Public Chat' panels is hard to read without zooming in.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size or crop the preview to focus on the active panels.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent automatically recompute and sync GS variance across the shared workspace upon user request.
